system.description: You cannot read or write and you cannot choose a Career with literacy as a requirement. You can buy off this Flaw as your character begins learning to read. You do not have to pay the full 10 Advancement Points all at once to buy off the Flaw, and can buy it off gradually. The more Advancement Points out of ten you have, the better you are at reading, advancing from being able to recognize only a few simple words at 1 AP to becoming completely literate at 10 AP when this Flaw is lost.
